description: Correct the configuration issue causing stale autocomplete suggestions to improve user satisfaction.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user types in the search bar WHEN autocomplete suggestions are displayed THEN all suggestions should be current and relevant.

story_title: Improve Search Relevance for Anonymous Users
description: Address the 15% drop in search relevance scores for anonymous users by adjusting the ranking algorithm to better accommodate non-authenticated queries.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an anonymous user WHEN they perform a search THEN the search relevance score should improve to at least 0.80.

story_title: Implement Security Measures for Search Queries
description: Ensure that all search queries are secured to protect user data and comply with privacy regulations.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a search query is submitted WHEN it is processed THEN user data should be encrypted and secured.

description: Reduce mobile search latency from 890ms to below 500ms to enhance user experience.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a mobile user WHEN they perform a search THEN the search latency should be less than 500ms.

story_title: Establish Baseline Metrics for Image Search
description: Implement instrumentation for image search to establish baseline metrics for performance evaluation.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an image search is performed WHEN the search is executed THEN the relevant analytics events should be logged.

description: Enhance the search results to improve the click-through rate based on user engagement metrics.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a search result is displayed WHEN a user clicks on it THEN the CTR should increase by at least 5%.

story_title: Re-run A/B Tests for Anonymous Users
description: Conduct targeted A/B tests for the new ranking algorithm focusing on anonymous users to gather relevant data.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an anonymous user is part of the A/B test WHEN they perform a search THEN their search relevance score should be tracked and analyzed.

description: Set up monitoring and alerting for search performance metrics to proactively identify issues.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN monitoring is implemented WHEN search performance metrics are collected THEN alerts should trigger for any anomalies.

description: Implement tracking for session abandonment rates post-search to gauge user satisfaction.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a search is performed WHEN the session is tracked THEN abandonment rates should be recorded and reported.

description: Implement a mechanism for collecting user feedback on search results to inform future improvements.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user interacts with search results WHEN they provide feedback THEN their input should be recorded and analyzed.

description: Ensure that all search features are accessible to users with disabilities, complying with WCAG standards.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user with disabilities accesses the search feature WHEN they use assistive technologies THEN all functionalities should be operable and compliant with WCAG 2.1 standards.

story_title: Search relevance score dropped 15% after deploy v2.4.1
description: Our p50 search relevance score fell from 0.85 to 0.72 immediately following the v2.4.1 release on 2025-10-28. The new ranking algorithm was intended to improve personalization but has had the opposite effect for the majority of queries. Rollback was considered but blocked by a dependent feature flag change. Requires root-cause analysis and remediation plan.

Support volume has spiked 3x since v2.4.1 rolled out. Users are reporting that top results no longer match their intent — e.g., searching 'invoice template' returns blog posts instead of product pages. Qualitative pattern: navigational queries are most affected. Long-tail queries seem unaffected. NPS from search sessions dropped from 42 to 28 in the past 7 days.

story_title: Search latency increased on mobile web
description: P95 search latency on mobile web has climbed to 890ms, up from a baseline of ~420ms pre-deploy. Desktop is unaffected at 210ms p95. Hypothesis: the new ranking model runs a heavier re-ranking step that is not cached for mobile sessions. No SLO breach yet but trending toward it. Requires profiling and either model optimization or mobile-specific caching.

story_title: Missing search analytics events for new query types
description: The v2.4.1 release added support for image search and voice search, but no analytics events were instrumented for these new query types. Events 'image_search_query', 'voice_search_query', and 'filter_applied' are completely absent from our data pipeline. This means we have zero visibility into adoption, success rates, or failure modes for these surfaces. Baseline instrumentation must be added before any experimentation.
